markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Screening interview for the Account Director, Operations role.](https://fathom.video/share/WxAU1Dz6Q_xcrmD79Jt2RnsV_RiFx4yo?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strong Fit:** Alex's current role at Graphite is nearly identical, managing 4 clients and overseeing a pod of 8, with a primary focus on renewals and high-level strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/WxAU1Dz6Q_xcrmD79Jt2RnsV_RiFx4yo?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [**Proven Results:** Drove significant impact, including a 40% increase in non-brand signups for Webflow via AEO (AI Engine Optimization) and successfully resolved a major cross-functional conflict.](https://fathom.video/share/WxAU1Dz6Q_xcrmD79Jt2RnsV_RiFx4yo?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
  - [**Aligned Philosophy:** Prioritizes the "5% that works" (high-impact tasks) and maintains an 80% team bandwidth target to create capacity for urgent client needs.](https://fathom.video/share/WxAU1Dz6Q_xcrmD79Jt2RnsV_RiFx4yo?tab=summary&timestamp=928.0)
  - [**Excited by Model:** Strongly interested in GrowthX's AI-native agency model and its plan to spin off the internal platform into a SaaS product for clients outside the ICP.](https://fathom.video/share/WxAU1Dz6Q_xcrmD79Jt2RnsV_RiFx4yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1824.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Agency & SaaS Model

  - [**Core Business:** Organic content agency (blogs, newsletters, social).](https://fathom.video/share/WxAU1Dz6Q_xcrmD79Jt2RnsV_RiFx4yo?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [**Internal Platform:** An AI workflow tool, built in-house after outgrowing AirOps, that will eventually become a client-facing SaaS product.](https://fathom.video/share/WxAU1Dz6Q_xcrmD79Jt2RnsV_RiFx4yo?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
  - [**Pod Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/WxAU1Dz6Q_xcrmD79Jt2RnsV_RiFx4yo?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
      - [**Account Director (This Role):** High-level strategist and relationship builder.](https://fathom.video/share/WxAU1Dz6Q_xcrmD79Jt2RnsV_RiFx4yo?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
      - [**Account Strategist:** Day-to-day PM, goal tracking, contractual alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/WxAU1Dz6Q_xcrmD79Jt2RnsV_RiFx4yo?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
      - [**Managing Editor / Content Manager:** Generates content in the platform.](https://fathom.video/share/WxAU1Dz6Q_xcrmD79Jt2RnsV_RiFx4yo?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [**Reporting:** The Account Director manages 2–3 pods, each with an Account Strategist and a content creator.](https://fathom.video/share/WxAU1Dz6Q_xcrmD79Jt2RnsV_RiFx4yo?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)

### Alex's Experience at Graphite

  - [**Current Role:** Account Director managing 4 clients and overseeing an 8-client pod.](https://fathom.video/share/WxAU1Dz6Q_xcrmD79Jt2RnsV_RiFx4yo?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [**Primary Focus:** High-level strategy and relationship building, with renewals as the main KPI.](https://fathom.video/share/WxAU1Dz6Q_xcrmD79Jt2RnsV_RiFx4yo?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
  - [**Strategic Approach:**](https://fathom.video/share/WxAU1Dz6Q_xcrmD79Jt2RnsV_RiFx4yo?tab=summary&timestamp=928.0)
      - [**"90/5 Rule":** Focus on the 5% of work that drives impact, not just best practices.](https://fathom.video/share/WxAU1Dz6Q_xcrmD79Jt2RnsV_RiFx4yo?tab=summary&timestamp=928.0)
      - [**Prioritization:** Based on client needs (renewals, new kickoffs, C-suite visibility), not just account size.](https://fathom.video/share/WxAU1Dz6Q_xcrmD79Jt2RnsV_RiFx4yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
  - [**Team Management:**](https://fathom.video/share/WxAU1Dz6Q_xcrmD79Jt2RnsV_RiFx4yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)
      - [**Direct Reports (4):** Focus on career growth and development.](https://fathom.video/share/WxAU1Dz6Q_xcrmD79Jt2RnsV_RiFx4yo?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)
      - [**Pod Capacity:** Directors meet monthly to plan staffing; leadership meets with sales to align on hiring.](https://fathom.video/share/WxAU1Dz6Q_xcrmD79Jt2RnsV_RiFx4yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)
      - [**Bandwidth Target:** Keep team at \~80% capacity to create a buffer for urgent work.](https://fathom.video/share/WxAU1Dz6Q_xcrmD79Jt2RnsV_RiFx4yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1467.0)

### Strategic Leadership & Cross-Functional Alignment

  - [**AEO (AI Engine Optimization) Success:**](https://fathom.video/share/WxAU1Dz6Q_xcrmD79Jt2RnsV_RiFx4yo?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
      - [Led AEO strategy for Webflow, driving a 40% increase in non-brand signups from ChatGPT since January.](https://fathom.video/share/WxAU1Dz6Q_xcrmD79Jt2RnsV_RiFx4yo?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
      - [Provides a strong foundation for advising clients on new AI models like Atlas.](https://fathom.video/share/WxAU1Dz6Q_xcrmD79Jt2RnsV_RiFx4yo?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [**Resolving Cross-Functional Conflict:**](https://fathom.video/share/WxAU1Dz6Q_xcrmD79Jt2RnsV_RiFx4yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)
      - [**Problem:** A major disconnect between the flexible Account team and the rigid Editorial team (e.g., fixed 1,500-word article limit).](https://fathom.video/share/WxAU1Dz6Q_xcrmD79Jt2RnsV_RiFx4yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)
      - [**Solution:**](https://fathom.video/share/WxAU1Dz6Q_xcrmD79Jt2RnsV_RiFx4yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
          - [Trained the pod on positive collaboration and end-to-end ownership.](https://fathom.video/share/WxAU1Dz6Q_xcrmD79Jt2RnsV_RiFx4yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
          - [Met with Editorial leadership to align on processes.](https://fathom.video/share/WxAU1Dz6Q_xcrmD79Jt2RnsV_RiFx4yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1319.0)
          - [Implemented a new editorial kickoff to flag project nuances early.](https://fathom.video/share/WxAU1Dz6Q_xcrmD79Jt2RnsV_RiFx4yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1349.0)
      - [**Result:** A more collaborative workflow, with junior staff now empowered to resolve issues.](https://fathom.video/share/WxAU1Dz6Q_xcrmD79Jt2RnsV_RiFx4yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1383.0)

### Management Philosophy & Lessons Learned

  - [**Biggest Mistake:** Overloading the team with work, which unintentionally reduced quality and increased Alex's own workload for corrections.](https://fathom.video/share/WxAU1Dz6Q_xcrmD79Jt2RnsV_RiFx4yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1675.0)
  - [**Lesson Learned:** Director decisions have a strong trickle-down effect. Now intentionally manages scope by pushing back on clients with a clear "yes, but here's the impact on the roadmap" framework.](https://fathom.video/share/WxAU1Dz6Q_xcrmD79Jt2RnsV_RiFx4yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1675.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Andi Bailey:** Schedule a follow-up interview for Alex with the Head of Customer Ops.](https://fathom.video/share/WxAU1Dz6Q_xcrmD79Jt2RnsV_RiFx4yo?tab=summary&timestamp=2475.0)
